description: Return a list of all Distribution Groups associated with a Project.

parameters.name: filters[search]
parameters.description: Returns item(s) matching the specified search query string.

parameters.name: sort
parameters.description: Return items with the specified sort.

parameters.name: view
parameters.description: Parameter affecting what level of detail will be returned from the endpoint. 'extended' will include the users included in each distribution group.

parameters.name: include_ancestors
parameters.description: Parameter affecting what groups will be returned from this endpoint. When 'true', this endpoint will only return distribution groups with users that match the provided (or default) `domain_id` and ...

parameters.name: domain_id
parameters.description: Parameter affecting the scope for the Distribution Groups, by default it is the Domain ID of the Submittals Tool. Will return only Distributions Groups who users that have access to the Tool specif...

parameters.name: min_ual
parameters.description: Parameter affecting the scope for the Distribution Groups, by default it is the 'read' user access level. Will return only Distributions Groups who users that have the min ual specified by the 'min...

parameters.name: ual
